message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'unix_autobind' sets signal field 'sockaddr_un.sun_family', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=sockaddr_un;field=sun_family;offset=0] [oracle:assert=sockaddr_un.sun_family stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets sun_family without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
